# CWE-273 — Improper Check for Dropped Privileges (safe)
lang: go
file: CWE-273-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"syscall"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Safe: verifies privilege drop before continuing request handling.
func DropAndServe(c *gin.Context) {
	if err := syscall.Setuid(1000); err != nil {
		c.JSON(500, gin.H{"error": "privilege drop failed"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"serving": true})
}
